risk_title: Security-related work suspensions affecting project implementation
risk_summary: Multiple road construction lots have experienced suspensions due to security issues, causing delays in project implementation. Lot 1 was suspended in November 2021 and resumed in April 2023; Lot 3 also experienced suspension due to security problems.
evidence_quote: Lot 1 (Nekempte – Andhode, 86.1 km) works contract began on December 20, 2020, but was suspended in November 2021 due to security issues. It resumed in April 2023, reaching 30.28% progress by June 2025... Lot 3 (Agamsa-Bure Section, 84.55 km) also commenced on December 20, 2020, and is progressing after a suspension due to security problems, reaching 60.68% completion.

risk_title: High political and governance risk rating
risk_summary: The project maintains a High risk rating in the Political and Governance category, indicating ongoing fragility in the political and governance environment affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: High (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 019 - 20 Feb 2025)

risk_title: High stakeholder risk affecting project delivery
risk_summary: The project is rated High for Stakeholder risk, suggesting tensions or challenges with stakeholder engagement that may be impacting implementation progress.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders: High High (Risk Category Rating at Approval vs Last Approved Rating)
